glosses.en: to put on makeup; to do someone's makeup
glosses.vi: trang điểm; trang điểm cho người khác
glosses.hi: मेकअप करना; किसी को मेकअप करना
glosses.ja: 化粧する; 人にメイクする

translations.en: I want to put on makeup now.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn trang điểm bây giờ.
translations.hi: मैं अभी मेकअप करना चाहती हूँ।

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause and controller of the reflexive 'mich'.
Modal auxiliary in present tense; selects the bare infinitive 'schminken' and expresses volition.
Reflexive use of the 1st person singular accusative form; direct object of 'schminken', coreferent with 'Ich'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Bare infinitive lexical verb; complements the modal 'will'. Reflexive interpretation with 'mich'.

sentences.target: Sie muss sich für das Treffen schminken.
sentences.reading: /ziː mʊs zɪç fyːɐ das ˈtʁɛfn̩ ˈʃmɪŋkən/

translations.de: Sie muss sich für das Treffen schminken.
translations.ipa: /ziː mʊs zɪç fyːɐ das ˈtʁɛfn̩ ˈʃmɪŋkən/
translations.en: She has to put on makeup for the meeting.
translations.es: Tiene que maquillarse para la reunión.
translations.fr: Elle doit se maquiller pour la réunion.
translations.pt: Ela precisa se maquiar para a reunião.
translations.vi: Cô ấy phải trang điểm cho buổi họp.
translations.nl: Ze moet zich opmaken voor de vergadering.
translations.hi: उसे मीटिंग के लिए मेकअप करना है।
translations.el: Πρέπει να βαφτεί για τη συνάντηση.
translations.nb: Hun må sminke seg til møtet.
translations.sv: Hon måste sminka sig inför mötet.
translations.ro: Ea trebuie să se machieze pentru întâlnire.
translations.da: Hun skal lægge makeup til mødet.
translations.ja: 彼女は会議のためにメイクしなきゃいけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary in present; selects bare infinitive 'schminken'; expresses necessity.
Reflexive pronoun, 3rd person accusative; direct object of 'schminken', coreferent with 'Sie'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a purpose/preparatory PP.
Definite article, neuter singular accusative; determiner of 'Treffen' under 'für'.
Noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'für'.
Bare infinitive main verb selected by 'muss'. Reflexive with 'sich'.

sentences.target: Du kannst mich später für die Party schminken.
sentences.reading: /duː kanst mɪç ˈʃpɛːtɐ fyːɐ diː ˈpaʁti ˈʃmɪŋkən/

translations.de: Du kannst mich später für die Party schminken.
translations.ipa: /duː kanst mɪç ˈʃpɛːtɐ fyːɐ diː ˈpaʁti ˈʃmɪŋkən/
translations.en: You can do my makeup later for the party.
translations.es: Puedes maquillarme más tarde para la fiesta.
translations.fr: Tu peux me maquiller plus tard pour la fête.
translations.it: Puoi truccarmi più tardi per la festa.
translations.ko: 파티를 위해 나중에 내 화장 좀 해줘.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以稍后帮我为派对化妆。
translations.yue: 你可以遲啲幫我為派對化妝。
translations.ru: Ты можешь позже накрасить меня для вечеринки.
translations.pt: Você pode me maquiar mais tarde para a festa.
translations.he: את יכולה לאפר אותי מאוחר יותר למסיבה.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể trang điểm cho tôi sau để đi dự tiệc.
translations.ar: يمكنك أن تضعي لي المكياج لاحقًا للحفلة.
translations.nl: Je kunt me later opmaken voor het feest.
translations.uk: Ти можеш пізніше нафарбувати мене для вечірки.
translations.hi: तुम बाद में पार्टी के लिए मेरा मेकअप कर सकती हो।
translations.pl: Możesz mnie później umalować na imprezę.
translations.el: Μπορείς να με βάψεις αργότερα για το πάρτι.
translations.nb: Du kan sminke meg senere til festen.
translations.id: Kamu bisa dandanin aku nanti buat pesta.
translations.sv: Du kan sminka mig senare till festen.
translations.ro: Poți să mă machiezi mai târziu pentru petrecere.
translations.cs: Můžeš mě později nalíčit na párty.
translations.da: Du kan lægge min makeup senere til festen.
translations.fi: Voit meikata minut myöhemmin bileitä varten.
translations.ja: あとでパーティーのために私のメイクをしてもいいよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary in present; selects bare infinitive 'schminken'; expresses ability/permission.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular accusative; direct object of 'schminken' (non-reflexive).
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a purpose/preparatory PP.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of 'Party' as object of 'für'.
Noun, feminine; object of 'für'.
Bare infinitive lexical verb selected by 'kannst'; here transitive with the object 'mich'.

sentences.target: Im Theater lassen sie die Kinder schminken.
sentences.reading: /ɪm teˈaːtɐ ˈlasn̩ ziː diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈʃmɪŋkən/

translations.de: Im Theater lassen sie die Kinder schminken.
translations.ipa: /ɪm teˈaːtɐ ˈlasn̩ ziː diː ˈkɪndɐ ˈʃmɪŋkən/
translations.en: At the theater, they do the kids’ makeup.
translations.es: En el teatro maquillan a los niños.
translations.fr: Au théâtre, ils maquillent les enfants.
translations.zh-Hans: 在剧院里，他们给孩子化妆。
translations.yue: 喺劇院度，佢哋會幫啲小朋友化妝。
translations.pt: No teatro, eles maquiam as crianças.
translations.vi: Ở rạp hát, họ trang điểm cho bọn trẻ.
translations.nl: In het theater maken ze de kinderen op.
translations.hi: थिएटर में बच्चों का मेकअप किया जाता है।
translations.ro: La teatru, îi machiază pe copii.
translations.ja: 劇場では子どもたちにメイクをする。

tokens.explanation: Preposition in contracted form ('in dem'); introduces locative PP, governing dative.
Noun, neuter; object of the preposition 'Im' (dative), head of the locative PP.
Finite verb (present), causative; takes bare infinitive complement 'schminken' and direct object 'die Kinder'.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person plural nominative; subject of 'lassen'.
Definite article, plural accusative; determiner of 'Kinder' as direct object of 'lassen'.
Plural noun; direct object of 'lassen'.
Bare infinitive complement of causative 'lassen'; denotes the action performed on 'die Kinder'.
